data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all orders associated with your account. Returns order summaries including order ID, status, and timestamps. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Use this to view order history and track transcription, translation, captioning, and subtitling jobs.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies what order data is returned, explains pagination support, indicates filtering/sorting capabilities via parameters, and provides context about order types (transcription, translation, captions, subtitles) to help AI agents understand when to use this operation for order management and tracking.

Enhanced version clarifies that this returns comprehensive order information (status, results, pricing, timestamps), distinguishes it from listOrders by emphasizing detailed data retrieval, and provides use cases (progress tracking, result retrieval, verification) to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific order by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific order by its ID. Use this to check order progress, retrieve completed transcriptions or translations, or verify order specifications.
